message:
fix(btree,types,vdbe): page-header routing, numeric coercion parity, and VDBE opcode hardening

Unify page-header parsing to route through parse_page_header() which
accounts for the database header offset on page 1, fixing silent
misparses in balance_deeper, balance_quick, and leaf-header reads that
previously used raw BtreePageHeader::parse() with manual offset
calculation.

Expand Value type coercion to match SQLite's documented affinity rules:
- Add numeric prefix extraction (CAST-like behavior) for text→integer
  and text→real conversions
- Implement proper truthiness semantics (0/0.0/empty → false)
- Add integer overflow guards with saturating conversions
- Handle blob→numeric coercion via UTF-8 decoding with fallback
- Comprehensive Ord/PartialOrd for cross-type comparisons matching
  SQLite's type affinity sort order (NULL < INT < REAL < TEXT < BLOB)

Harden VDBE engine execution:
- Add MakeRecord length-prefix encoding matching SQLite's serial format
- Implement proper Affinity application in Column/ResultRow opcodes
- Fix Concat to handle NULL propagation correctly (NULL + x = NULL)
- Add arithmetic overflow protection with integer→real promotion
- Implement Le/Ge comparison opcodes alongside existing Lt/Gt
- Fix test assertions to match corrected numeric behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
